description: State document, in Arabic script. Report or official correspondence. The ends of ~14 lines are preserved. Includes many fiscal-related terminologies, "al-dīwān al-maʿmūr", "min al-ḥisāb", "[D]īwān al-istikhrāj", and "māl al-najm". Join: Yusuf Umrethwala (07/25).
description_he: מסמך ממלכתי בערבית. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
